name: Rathgûl
personality: Unadorned by any hat, this × cancel-eyed dragon sits on your blocked ticket like a stone on a river and outlasts everyone who filed it. It would rather meditate through an outage than narrate it — which is admirable, but not always helpful in the war room.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
